articles.title: Basic business class is here with new, stripped-down United Polaris fares
articles.summary: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.

articles.title: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
articles.summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

articles.title: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
articles.summary: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.

articles.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
articles.summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
